LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CYBERMASS SOLUTIONS INC.'S DEMURRER TO EACH OF THE 27 AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES ALLEGED IN DEFENDANT DYNAMIC SOFTWARE SERVICES' ANSWER IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. WHILE THE DEMURRER MAY ARGUABLY TECHNICALLY CORRECT AS TO SOME OF THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, IT SERVES NO USEFUL PURPOSE AND DELAYS THE SETTLEMENT OF THE PLEADINGS AND INCREASE THE COST OF LITIGATION. IF CYBERMASS NEEDS FURTHER INFORMATION AS TO ANY OR ALL OF THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, IT SHOULD SERVE APPROPRIATE DISCOVERY. IF THERE ARE TRULY ANY AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES FOR WHICH CYBERMASS NEEDS A RULING IN ADVANCE OF TRIAL, WHICH IS DOUBTFUL, CYBERMASS SHOULD FILE A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THOSE DEFENSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JUDGE KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 16251041)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ramsey Hanafi of Quintana Hanafi LLP telephone number 415-735-5285 for Defendant Dynamic Software Services.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CYBERMASS SOLUTIONS INC.'S DEMURRER to each of the 27 affirmative defenses alleged in defendant Dynamic Software Services' answer is overruled in its entirety. While the demurrer may arguably technically correct as to some of the affirmative defenses, it serves no useful purpose and delays the settlement of the pleadings and increase the cost of litigation. If Cybermass needs further information as to any or all of the affirmative defenses, it should serve appropriate discovery. If there are truly any affirmative defenses for which Cybermass needs a ruling in advance of trial, which is doubtful, Cybermass should file a motion for summary adjudication as to those defenses. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
